user.title: Add RYSE SmartShade
user.description: Put your RYSE device in pairing mode (press the PAIR button) and click Next to continue.

scan.title: Select RYSE SmartShade
scan.description: Press the button on your RYSE SmartShade to put it in pairing mode, then select it below and click Submit. Devices in pairing mode are marked. If you don't see your device, press the button and click Submit again to refresh.

name.title: Name Your SmartShade
name.description: Enter a name for your SmartShade.

settings.title: Configure SmartShade
settings.description: Configure settings for your SmartShade. You can change these later from the integration options.

data_description.disable_battery_sensor: Hide the battery sensor for this device. Useful for plugged-in blinds that report unreliable battery values.

error.not_in_pairing_mode: The selected device is not in pairing mode. Please press the pairing button on your RYSE Smart Shade and try again.
error.no_devices_found: No RYSE Smart Shades found. Please make sure your device is powered on and in pairing mode, then try again.
error.failed_to_pair: Failed to pair with the RYSE device. Please ensure it is in pairing mode and not already paired with another device, then try again.

init.title: Re-pair {name}
init.description:
The Bluetooth session for **{name}** has lost its pairing.

1. Press the **PAIR button** on your RYSE SmartShade
2. Click **Submit** to reconnect and re-pair

Your existing settings will be kept.

abort.device_not_found: Could not find the device. Make sure it is powered on and nearby.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Make sure it is in pairing mode and try again.
abort.repair_failed: Re-pairing failed. Try pressing the PAIR button again and retry.

data_description.disable_battery_sensor: Hide the battery sensor for this device. Useful for plugged-in blinds that report unreliable battery values.
